ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "datadate" TEXT /* Date of the data */,
  "tic" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "adjcp" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the day */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the day */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades */,
  "macd" REAL /* Moving Average Convergence Divergence */,
  "rsi" REAL /* Relative Strength Index */,
  "cci" REAL /* Commodity Channel Index */,
  "adx" REAL /* Average Directional Index */,
  "turbulence" REAL /* Turbulence index */,
  "tic_change" REAL /* Change in ticker symbol */,
  "pre_close" REAL /* Previous day's closing price */,
  "change_amount" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades executed during the day */,
  "turnover_rate" REAL /* Turnover rate of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-Earnings ratio */,
  "pb_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-Book ratio */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization */,
  "source_exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange where the data was sourced from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("datadate", "tic")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technical indicator */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the technical indicator */,
  "time_period" INTEGER /* Time period over which the indicator is calculated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the indicator is a default indicator for the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "tic" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tic"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "datadate" TEXT /* Date of the data */,
  "tic" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "turbulence" REAL /* Turbulence index */,
  "tic_change" REAL /* Change in ticker symbol */,
  "volatility_index" REAL /* Volatility index of the market */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* Change in volume from the previous day */,
  "price_change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "source_exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange where the data was sourced from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("datadate", "tic")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Subscription level of the user (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "tic" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Subscription level of the user at the time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_tic FOREIGN KEY ("tic") REFERENCES stocks ("tic")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "tic" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price change, technical indicator threshold) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alert is active */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was last triggered */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Subscription level of the user at the time the alert was set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_tic FOREIGN KEY ("tic") REFERENCES stocks ("tic")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the stock exchange */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the stock exchange was founded */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the stock exchange */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (if applicable) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total market capitalization of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)
